item.title: Version 1.9.16
item.description:
What's New in 1.9.16

  • Clearer reset timing in the menu bar popover — 5-hour and 7-day reset times are easier to scan, with cleaner captions and better spacing for both Codex and Claude Code.
  • Better readability on light backgrounds — The popover keeps its material look, but now holds up better over bright pages and windows.
  • Smoother refresh behavior — Gauges no longer jump to a misleading halfway state while data is updating. If previous data exists, it stays visible until fresh data arrives.
  • Launch at login in onboarding — First-run setup now includes launch-at-login, so it is easier to keep AIQuota available from the menu bar.
    • ![Screenshot](https://github.com/niederme/ai-quota/releases/download/v1.9.16/AIQuota-1.9.16.png)
